heading: Definitions
label: 55605 Definitions
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of the James M. Inhofe National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2023, referred to in par. (2), is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 117–263Dec. 23, 2022

Amendments2022— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section defined the term “marine highway transportation” as used in this chapter.Pub. L. 117–2632021— substituted “Marine highway” for “Short sea” in section catchline and “marine highway transportation” for “short sea transportation” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 116–2832015—Par. (1)(C), (D). added subpars. (C) and (D).Pub. L. 114–922012—, which directed amendment of section 55605, without specifying the title to be amended, by substituting “by a documented vessel” for “by vessel” in the matter preceding par. (1), was executed to this section, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 112–213

children.label: i
children.text: contained in intermodal cargo containers and loaded by crane on the vessel;

children.label: ii
children.text: loaded on the vessel by means of wheeled technology, including roll-on roll-off cargo;

children.label: iii
children.text: shipped in discrete units or packages that are handled individually, palletized, or unitized for purposes of transportation;

children.label: iv
children.text: bulk, liquid, or loose cargo loaded in tanks, holds, hoppers, or on deck; or

children.label: v
children.text: freight vehicles carried aboard commuter ferry boats; and

children.label: i
children.text: loaded at a port in the United States and unloaded either at another port in the United States or at a port in Canada or Mexico; or

children.label: ii
children.text: loaded at a port in Canada or Mexico and unloaded at a port in the United States.

The term “Tribal government” means the recognized governing body of any Indian or Alaska Native Tribe, band, nation, pueblo, village, community, component band, or component reservation, individually identified (including parenthetically) in the list published most recently, as of the date of enactment of the James M. Inhofe National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2023, pursuant to section 104 of the Federally Recognized Indian Tribe List Act of 1994 ().25 U.S.C. 5131
The term “Alaska Native Corporation” has the meaning given the term “Native Corporation” under section 3 of the Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act ().43 U.S.C. 1602
